mapper.delete: delete from wishlist where MEM_ID = #{memId} and PRO_NO = #{proNo}
mapper.update: update member set MEM_BALANCE = (SELECT MEM_BALANCE from member where MEM_ID = #{memId})-#{usedPoint}+#{pointBonus} where mem_id = #{memId}
update product set PRO_AMOUNT = (select PRO_AMOUNT from product where PRO_NO = #{proNos})-#{odtNum} where PRO_NO = #{proNos}
